app_overview.venue: Las Vegas Convention Center (LVCC) + Venetian Expo + Aria + Mandalay Bay
app_overview.description: The official mobile companion for CES 2026, the world's most influential technology event. Built on Eventbase platform technology.

primary_navigation.description: Personalized landing screen with quick access to saved sessions, upcoming meetings, and real-time event updates
sub_pages: Quick Action Buttons (Scan Badge, Message, Schedule)

primary_navigation.description: Complete conference programming with personal calendar integration
Comprehensive exhibitor directory with search and filtering
sub_pages: Exhibitor Profiles (Company info, products, booth number)

primary_navigation.description: Peer-to-peer networking and professional connection tools

sub_pages: Interactive Floor Plans (LVCC, Venetian, Aria, Mandalay Bay)
Points of Interest (Restrooms, Food, Charging Stations)

primary_navigation.description: Real-time event coverage and curated content

networking_capabilities: Attendee Connect: AI-powered networking recommendations based on interests, industry, and goals
Smart Badge Scanning: Exchange contact info by scanning attendee badges
In-App Messaging: Direct 1:1 chat between attendees
Meeting Scheduler: Book bilateral meetings with suggested time slots
Digital Business Cards: Create and share virtual business cards
Connection Management: Track pending and accepted connections
scheduling_tools: Personal Agenda Builder: Create custom schedule from 1,000+ sessions
Calendar Sync: Export to Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar
Session Reminders: Push notifications 15 min before sessions
Waitlist Alerts: Get notified if waitlisted session opens up
Conflict Detection: Warns of overlapping session bookings
Add to Schedule: One-tap session enrollment
exhibitor_engagement: Booth Locator: Find exact location on interactive maps
Product Search: Search 4,000+ exhibitor product listings
Favorites: Save exhibitors and products for later
Notes: Take notes on specific exhibitors/products
Contact Request: Request follow-up from exhibitors
navigation_features: Multi-Venue Maps: LVCC North/South/Central, Venetian Expo, Aria, Mandalay Bay
Indoor Positioning: Blue-dot navigation inside venues
Booth-to-Booth Routing: Get walking directions between exhibitors
Venue Transit Info: Shuttle schedules between venues
Real-Time Crowd Density: See busy areas to avoid
content_delivery: Live Streaming: Watch keynotes and select sessions remotely
On-Demand Library: Access recorded sessions post-event
Downloadable Resources: Whitepapers, presentations, press kits
Social Sharing: Share sessions/products to LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.
Personal Notes: Attach notes to any session or exhibitor

business_model.overview: The CES 2026 Official App is NOT a direct revenue-generating product. It is a value-add service bundled into CTA membership and event registration fees. The app serves as a strategic enabler for CTA's core revenue streams.

cta_organization.name: Consumer Technology Association (CTA)
cta_organization.primary_mission: Promote the consumer technology industry through advocacy, standards, research, and events

1_exhibitor_booth_fees.description: Primary revenue driver - booth space rental

2_attendee_registration_fees.description: Conference pass sales for non-exhibitor attendees

3_cta_membership_dues.description: Annual membership fees from technology companies

membership_tiers.benefits: Full advocacy, research access, CES priority
Board access, policy input, exclusive events
C-suite forums, strategic advisory, maximum CES benefits

4_sponsorships_and_advertising.description: Official event sponsorships and in-app advertising

sponsorship_packages.benefits: Naming rights, keynote presence, exclusive branding
Logo prominence, VIP access, speaking slots
Logo on session, intro speaking opportunity
Splash screen ads, banner ads, push notification sponsorships, featured listings

5_ancillary_services.description: Additional paid services during the event

6_research_and_publications.description: CTA produces industry research sold to members and non-members

products.product: U.S. Consumer Technology Sales and Forecasts

app_monetization_model.direct_revenue: NONE - App is free to all registered attendees and exhibitors

indirect_revenue_streams.description: Featured exhibitor listings, sponsored search results, banner advertisements within app
Enhanced exhibitor profiles, push notification campaigns, lead retrieval integration
Aggregated attendee behavior data sold to exhibitors (anonymized), foot traffic analytics, session popularity reports
In-app booking of CTA meeting rooms with commission

strategic_value_of_app.attendee_retention: Increases perceived value of registration, justifying $1,700-$3,000 conference passes
strategic_value_of_app.exhibitor_roi: Lead retrieval and meeting scheduling prove ROI, encouraging $500K-$2M booth investments
strategic_value_of_app.data_collection: Rich behavioral data on 130K+ attendees informs future programming and pricing
strategic_value_of_app.operational_efficiency: Reduces need for printed materials, staff wayfinding, manual scheduling
strategic_value_of_app.network_effects: Better networking = higher satisfaction = higher renewal rates for both attendees and exhibitors
strategic_value_of_app.competitive_moat: Official app creates lock-in; third-party apps cannot replicate CTA's data access
strategic_value_of_app.sponsorship_value: Digital sponsorships in app command premium prices due to captive audience

technology_stack.platform: Eventbase (now part of Tripleseat) - leading event app platform

similarities: Both are official event apps for major global conferences
Both focus on networking, scheduling, and navigation
Both serve as strategic enablers for parent organization revenue
differences: CES: Open to 130K+ attendees; WEF: ~3,000 ultra-elite invitees
CES: Mass-market tech focus; WEF: Policy/economic elite focus
CES: Heavy exhibitor/sponsorship model; WEF: Membership dues model
CES: Public-facing with media coverage; WEF: Closed-door Chatham House
CES: In-app advertising accepted; WEF: No advertising, pure utility
